questions.question: 有關建立適當的輪班制度，以下敘述何者有誤？
questions.question_en: In order to build up a proper shift-work system, which of the following is incorrect?
questions.A: 建立一個可預測的輪班制度，使工作人員得以妥善的規劃個人的休息及睡眠時間， 以降發生疲勞的可能性。
questions.B: 考量體能及精神負荷，避免在夜間安排執行高時間壓力的 工作。
questions.C: 採用循環更動輪值時間(Rotating Shift Pattern)的制度，較能有效避免發 生疲勞的狀況。
questions.A_en: Establish a predictable shift-work system, to enable staff could properly planning of individuals rest and sleep time, and minimize the possibility of the occurrence of fatigue.
questions.B_en: Take account of reduced physical and mental capacity at night by avoiding the scheduling of such work under strong time pressures.
questions.C_en: Establish a Rotating Shift Pattern system to effectively prevent the occurrence of fatigue.

questions.question: 失誤鍊模型中，最危險的情況會發生在下列何時?
questions.question_en: In the chain of errors model the most dangerous situation occurs when …

questions.question: 冰山模型中，浮出水面可見的部分...
questions.question_en: In the ice-berg model the part you see is …
questions.C: 跟隱藏的部分一樣危險
questions.C_en: … as dangerous as the hidden part.

questions.question: 以下哪一項屬於潛在或隱性的失誤?
questions.question_en: What is a latent error?

questions.question: 對於沒有釀成失事但仍產生些許問題的疏失，下列分類何者正確?
questions.question_en: What is the correct term for an error that does not cause an accident but still causes a problem?

questions.question: 對於人為疏失，以下何者是正面的看法?
questions.question_en: What is a positive point of view of a human error?
questions.A: 不好的因素已經被移除掉
questions.B: 我們可以從錯誤中學習

questions.question: 失誤管理的兩大要素包括…
questions.question_en: What are the two components of error management?

questions.question: 失誤管理的基本原則是甚麼?
questions.question_en: What is the basic principle behind error management?
questions.A: 失誤是隨機發生的事件

questions.question: 以下何者不是減少失誤的方法?
questions.question_en: Which of the following is NOT a way to minimize error?
questions.B: 減少失誤發生的可能性
questions.C: 減少特定工作失誤的危險性
questions.C_en: reduce the danger of errors for a particular task

questions.question: 以下何者是減少失誤的方法?
questions.question_en: Which of the following is a way to minimize error?
questions.A: 讓潛在的狀況更不清楚

questions.question: 誰最應該負責確認工作是否按照安全規定或訓練完成?
questions.question_en: Who is mostly responsible to ensure work is done in accordance with any safety instruction and/or training received?

questions.question: 以下何者對於個人的安全及健康態度有最多的影響?
questions.question_en: What has the greatest effect on the safety and health attitude of an individual?

questions.question: 維持工作場所的安全與健康的目的為何?
questions.question_en: What is the purpose of handling health and safety in the work force?
questions.C: 運用資源 18 (B09) 人為因素學
